Jenna Bush Hageris always playing wing woman toHoda Kotb, even while she’s in Paris covering the 2024 Summer Olympics.

Just before Kotb left for Paris, she and Bush Hager discussed a recent appearance Kate Hudson made onWatch What Happens Live, where she sharedshe could “smell”Matthew McConaughey “from a mile away” because he didn’t wear deodorant.

“I like a clean fresh, out of the shower. I think that’s really sexy but everyone’s got their own thing. A lot of people like that whole pheromone thing,” Kotb commented.

Bush Hager teased that she may be able to find something like that in Paris. “Maybe you’ll meet a pheromone man in France,” she said.

Kotb playfully rolled her eyes as she said, “Oh my word, you know what?!”

Bush Hager then set the scene so Kotb could picture it. “I think down in Francais,” she teased in a French accent. “You never know though, right? You could be in a cafe sipping a little cappuccino.”

Kotb didn’t comment on whether she expected to meet a “pheromone man” but she did laugh at her co-host’s accent. “I love your accent. You have one universal accent for everything, it’s hilarious,” she said.

TheTodayladies are quite open about their love lives. While Bush Hager can be quite candid about her marriage, Kotb has been known to discuss her experiences dating and with past partners.

On one occasion, Kotb even revealed she oncemade out with someonein a furniture store. The conversation took such a steamy turn on the show that Bush Hager admitted she was beginning to feel “uncomfortable.”

“You don’t need to do it in a store because you have your own bedroom!” Bush Hager said after Kotb’s shocking confession.

“It’s not about needing!” Kotb fired back. She later added, “It was totally sexy. And a turn on, yes.”

Bush Hager even tried toset Kotb up with Dave Bautistawhen he visitedTodayto promoteMy Spy: The Eternal City. After finding out he’s single, Bush Hager told her co-host, “Hoda, get closer to Dave! Dave is handsome. You look great, Dave. We can see it.”

Today with Hoda & Jennaairs on weekdays at 10/9c on NBC.

title: ‘Today’s Jenna Bush Hager Hopes Hoda Kotb Meets A “Pheromone Man” During The Paris Olympics: “You Never Know” | Decider
description: 'Today's Jenna Bush Hager tells Hoda Kotb she hopes she meets a "pheromone man" while she's in Paris covering the Olympics.
